info.title: Teable App
info.description: Manage Data as easy as drink a cup of tea

200.description: Get space manage list total successfully

x-codeSamples.source:
curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage/count \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage/count", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request GET \
  --url 'http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage?search=SOME_STRING_VALUE&skip=SOME_NUMBER_VALUE&take=SOME_NUMBER_VALUE' \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

import http.client

conn = http.client.HTTPConnection("127.0.0.1:3000")

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

conn.request("GET", "/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage?search=SOME_STRING_VALUE&skip=SOME_NUMBER_VALUE&take=SOME_NUMBER_VALUE", headers=headers)

res = conn.getresponse()
data = res.read()

print(data.decode("utf-8"))

curl --request DELETE \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage/%7BspaceId%7D/remove-organization \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

curl --request POST \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage/%7BspaceId%7D/add-organization \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'

headers = { 'Authorization': "Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN" }

curl --request GET \
  --url http://127.0.0.1:3000/api/enterprise/%7BorganizationId%7D/space-manage/%7BspaceId%7D \
  --header 'Authorization: Bearer REPLACE_BEARER_TOKEN'
